# Node Interface

## Tunnel

  - [single node](./InterfaceTunnelNode.md)
  - [selected nodes](./InterfaceTunnelNodes.md)
  - [all nodes](./InterfaceTunnelNodesAll.md)

  - [Interface ID](./InterfaceTunnelId.md)

Output options:

  - [json](./InterfaceTunnelOutputJson.md)
